intro: Silene jenisea, also known as Jenisea catchfly, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Silene jenisea include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Silene jenisea is often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
